name: @andreapalladiokiv/n8n-sync
description: CI/CD sync for n8n workflows — TypeScript engine. 2.x runs INSIDE the n8n process (drop-in CLI commands + external hook) reusing n8n's own DataSource + ImportService (no bundled DB driver, no REST activation); host side does pure JSON normalize.

scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run build && node --import tsx --test "test/unit/*.test.ts" "test/*.test.mjs"
